title: Margot Robbie secretly splashes $28m on a Queensland ranch estate
summary_full: Margot Robbie has made headlines with her recent acquisition of a lavish estate in Queensland, costing $28 million. Nestled in the scenic Currumbin Valley, this property holds significant nostalgia for the actress, as it's near where she grew up. After leaving the Gold Coast in her youth to chase her acting ambitions, this return represents a heartfelt reconnection with her origins during her flourishing career.
